logo_choice.rationale: User did not contest synthesizer pick — c34120b0 is the unambiguous canonical orange-squircle Mi mark in nav.

palette_anchor.rationale: Single dominant chord — not ambiguous; user did not contest.

typography_decision.rationale: User chose Xiaomi-hosted webfont. CSS file declares the full @font-face stack at weights 300/400/500/600/700; we @import it once at the top of the deck.

slide_emphasis: Type H — data table / spec chart
Type J — big pull-quote / value statement
scope_of_deck: Brand verification deck — proves the DS produces decks faithful to Xiaomi global's engineered-cinematic visual register; usable by another agent for product launches, internal reviews, ESG decks.
